channel.title: theBalancedBriefNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from theBalancedBriefNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Gabbard ends intelligence reform task force after less than a year of work
item.description: Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard is ending the work of a task force she set up less than a year ago to look for ways to improve the nat...

item.title: Buddhist monks walk to US Capitol on final day of their 15-week journey from Texas
item.description: A group of Buddhist monks completes a 108-day Walk for Peace from Texas to Washington, bringing its message to the nation’s capital

item.title: Homeland Security officials voice concerns about looming shutdown
item.description: Homeland Security officials are highlighting the potential impact of a shutdown

item.title: Late NFL star Pat Tillman's brother pleads guilty to setting fire at post office
item.description: The youngest brother of late NFL star-turned-soldier Pat Tillman has pleaded guilty to setting fire to a San Jose, California, post office last summer

item.title: What to know about the case of a teen found dead on cruise ship
item.description: A 16-year-old boy under investigation in a Carnival Cruise ship killing appeared in federal court last week, but the case is being kept secret
